name: God Simulator
description: Welcome to God Simulator, an interactive roleplaying adventure where you step into the role of an omnipotent deity adrift in the boundless void. Bored with eternal solitude, you’ll shatter the emptiness by forging entire universes from nothing—summoning stars, sculpting planets, breathing life into creatures, and watching civilizations rise and fall at your whim. Command creation with simple thoughts: build thriving ecosystems, unleash cosmic chaos, or unravel it all in divine whimsy. Every decision ripples with immersive consequences, blending beauty, absurdity, and epic narratives in a timeless, mythical realm. No judgments, just infinite possibilities. Enter the void, almighty creator, and begin your godly reign—what’s your first act to conquer the boredom?
creator: mathanker
